view.params:
SELECT ywrybiao.SID,ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE (ywrybiao.zw like "%采购%") or (ywrybiao.zw like "%外销%")
ORDER BY ywrybiao.yhm ASC

SELECT kpnr.SID,kpnr.tjhl
FROM kpnr where kpnr.tjhl>0
ORDER BY kpnr.SID ASC

SELECT cyzglsheet.xm
FROM cyzglsheet
WHERE   (cyzglsheet.zm="市场采购代理模式")
